Package neqsim.pvtsimulation.flowassurance

Class WaterCompatibilityScreener

java.lang.Object
neqsim.pvtsimulation.flowassurance.WaterCompatibilityScreener
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class WaterCompatibilityScreener extends Object implements Serializable
Screens two water sources for compatibility by evaluating mineral scale risk at different mixing ratios.

Water compatibility is critical in oilfield operations when formation water meets injection water (e.g., seawater). This class mixes the two waters at varying ratios and evaluates the scale risk at each ratio using the ScalePredictionCalculator.

Usage: 

 
 WaterCompatibilityScreener screener = new WaterCompatibilityScreener();
 screener.setFormationWater(400, 10, 5, 0, 150, 10, 35000, 80, 100, 2.0, 6.5);
 screener.setInjectionWater(20, 0, 0, 0, 100, 2700, 35000, 80, 100, 0.5, 7.0);
 screener.setMixingRatios(new double[] {0, 10, 20, 30, 50, 70, 90, 100});
 screener.calculate();
 System.out.println(screener.toJson());
Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:

  • Method Details

    • setFormationWater

      public void setFormationWater(double caMgL, double baMgL, double srMgL, double feMgL, double hco3MgL, double so4MgL, double tdsMgL, double tempC, double pressBar, double co2pp, double pH)
      Sets the formation water composition.
      Parameters:
      caMgL - calcium mg/L
      baMgL - barium mg/L
      srMgL - strontium mg/L
      feMgL - iron mg/L
      hco3MgL - bicarbonate mg/L
      so4MgL - sulphate mg/L
      tdsMgL - TDS mg/L
      tempC - temperature Celsius
      pressBar - pressure bara
      co2pp - CO2 partial pressure bar
      pH - pH

    • setInjectionWater

      public void setInjectionWater(double caMgL, double baMgL, double srMgL, double feMgL, double hco3MgL, double so4MgL, double tdsMgL, double tempC, double pressBar, double co2pp, double pH)
      Sets the injection water composition.
      Parameters:
      caMgL - calcium mg/L
      baMgL - barium mg/L
      srMgL - strontium mg/L
      feMgL - iron mg/L

      so4MgL - sulphate mg/L
      tdsMgL - TDS mg/L
      tempC - temperature Celsius
      pressBar - pressure bara
      co2pp - CO2 partial pressure bar
      pH - pH
